title: trisetaria carpatica
intro: Trisetaria carpatica is a type of grass commonly known as Carpathian hair grass or Carpathian false brome, belonging to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, particularly in Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trisetaria carpatica include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal remedies to enhance its medicinal effects.
